message:
fix(tmux): set GT_TOWN_ROOT in global env for run-shell cycle groups

After 635916ab switched to the default tmux socket, prefix+n/p cycle
groups broke because run-shell executes with CWD=$HOME, and
FindFromCwd() cannot locate the workspace. The daemon now sets
GT_TOWN_ROOT in tmux global environment, and detectTownRootFromCwd()
reads it as a final fallback when inside tmux.

- Add SetGlobalEnvironment/GetGlobalEnvironment to tmux package
- Set GT_TOWN_ROOT in tmux global env during daemon startup
- Add tmux global env fallback in detectTownRootFromCwd()
- Add tmux-global-env fixable doctor check with tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -166,6 +166,7 @@ func runDoctor(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
 	// start with missing PATH exports. See gt-99u.
 	d.Register(doctor.NewClaudeSettingsCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewDaemonCheck())
+	d.Register(doctor.NewTmuxGlobalEnvCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewBootHealthCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewTownBeadsConfigCheck())
 	d.Register(doctor.NewCustomTypesCheck())
